results.title: What to know about rare visit by China's Xi to North Korea for talks with Kim Jong Un
results.description: China, the North's economic pipeline, is expected to reassert its influence over a traditionally allied government that has grown closer to Russia in recent times.

results.title: Man held for murdering teen daughter of live-in partner in Punjab
results.description: A 23-year-old man in Punjab was arrested for allegedly strangling his live-in partner’s 16-year-old daughter, concealing the body in a suitcase, and burning it in a forested area of SBS Nagar. Police traced him through CCTV footage and recovered the charred remains
